Title: Patient Safety from Electrical Shock
Description: The device shall not expose the patient to harmful electrical currents during normal use or single fault condition
Acceptance Criteria: No current exceeding 10uA reaches patient during normal operation

Title: Battery Life for Full Shift
Description: The device shall operate continuously for at least 8 hours on a single battery charge
Acceptance Criteria: Device operates for 8+ hours under typical clinical load

Title: Accurate Temperature Reading
Description: The device shall measure body temperature within ±0.1°C accuracy
Acceptance Criteria: Temperature readings within ±0.1°C verified against calibrated reference

Title: Ease of Cleaning
Description: The device housing shall withstand standard hospital disinfection protocols
Acceptance Criteria: Housing survives 1000 cycles of 70% isopropanol wipe-down without degradation

Title: Audible Alarm for Critical Values
Description: The device shall emit an audible alarm when measured values exceed clinically defined thresholds
Acceptance Criteria: Alarm triggers within 2 seconds of threshold breach at minimum 65dB at 1m
